subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath believed in God, soared in the atmosphere of His good-pleasure, quaffed from the chalice of His eternity, and hearkened unto His call with an attentive ear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن آمن بالله و طار فی هواء رضائه و شرب عن کاس بقائه و سمع ندائه باذن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
